title: Yin-Yang
intro: Yin-Yang is a logic puzzle where you fill every cell with either a black circle () or a white circle ().
board_example: Some cells are pre-filled as clues. Your goal is to fill the remaining cells.
rule_connected: All black circles must form a single connected group (connected horizontally or vertically, not diagonally). Likewise, all white circles must also form a single connected group.
rule_no_2x2: No 2×2 region of cells may be entirely the same color.
rule_clues: Pre-filled circles are clues and cannot be changed. Use them as starting points for your deductions.
solved: The puzzle is solved when every cell is filled and all rules are satisfied.
control_cycle: Left click to cycle forward, right click to cycle backward between:
control_mark_black: Placing a black circle ()
control_mark_white: Placing a white circle ()

compact.rule_fill: Fill every cell with a black or white circle.
compact.rule_connected: All cells of the same color must be orthogonally connected as a single group.
compact.rule_no_2x2: No 2×2 block of cells may all be the same color.
